TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Mike_Bibby, title = Mike_Bibby, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mike_Bibby} }

S.FORM: Mike Bibby sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1978, ryax sa tay 13 nqu tay 5, Mike Bibby, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Mike Bibby sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1978, ryax sa tay 13 nqu tay 5, Mike Bibby, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: mike βiββj s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, mike βiββj, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
